notes:
### v1.2.3 Hotfix

#### Fixed
- Weekly gold progress handles difficulty mismatch losses correctly. Gold lost to a difficulty mismatch now counts as resolved progress instead of remaining gold. Fully cleared rosters with mismatch losses now show 100% complete and 0 gold remaining while still showing the lost gold warning.
- Application icon scaling improved. The generated LOA Tracker application icon assets were refreshed from the updated app icon source so the icon appears cleaner at packaged Windows icon sizes.

## Installation
Download `loatracker_1.2.3_x64-setup.exe` below.
